ai_summaries.markets:
Today, the markets are exhibiting a slight upward movement, with the current price hovering around equilibrium within the 3-day dealing range. The recent session has shown a sweep of the prior-day low, indicating sell-side liquidity has been taken, while the prior-day high remains unchallenged.

• The current price is at approximately 7367, situated in equilibrium (41% of the 3-day range).
• Prior-day high at 7428 has not yet been swept, presenting potential liquidity above.
• The prior-day low at 7337 was swept today, indicating a sell-side liquidity run.
• Today's range reflects a high of 7419 and a low of 7324, with NY session highs/lows at 7419/7324.

Despite the upward movement, the Nasdaq is facing pressure from key tech stocks, particularly Apple, which has been a drag on overall performance. The mixed earnings reports, especially from Micron, contribute to the market's divided sentiment.

WHAT TO WATCH  
• Observe how price reacts around the prior-day high of 7428; a sweep could indicate a liquidity grab.  
• Monitor for potential market structure shifts as price navigates through the equilibrium zone.  
• Pay attention to any displacement that may occur from the current price level, particularly in response to upcoming earnings reports.

SAGE INSIGHT: The recent sweep of the prior-day low illustrates the concept of liquidity runs, where price action seeks out sell-side liquidity before potentially reversing. This teaches traders to remain vigilant for signs of market structure shifts following such sweeps, as they can provide insights into the intentions of smart money and the potential for rebalancing within the dealing range.
